message:
feat(perf): add MessageRenderCache for per-message rendered content memoization (PERF-1)

Introduces a lightweight per-message render cache that avoids
re-rendering unchanged conversation messages every frame in the TUI.
This directly addresses PERF-1 (render hot path optimization) by
memoizing the rendered string output for each ConversationMessage.

Architecture:
- `MessageCacheKey`: content hash + collapsed state + role, computed
  via std::hash::DefaultHasher for O(1) cache key comparison
- `MessageRenderCache`: interior-mutability cache (RefCell) indexed by
  message position, with generation-based bulk invalidation for events
  like terminal resize, theme change, or thinking toggle
- Generation bumps are O(1) — no entry iteration needed. Stale entries
  are lazily detected on lookup by comparing per-entry generation
  against the global generation counter

Cache key includes:
- Content hash (message text + thinking text when visible)
- Collapsed state (tool messages expand/collapse)
- tools_expanded flag (only for Tool role messages)
- Message role

Includes comprehensive test coverage:
- Cache hit/miss for content changes
- Collapse toggle invalidation for tool messages
- Generation bump forcing full cache miss
- Clear removing all entries
- Thinking visibility affecting cache key
- tools_expanded affecting key only for tool messages
- Out-of-bounds index returning None

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
